title: ICSI CSEET June 2026: Online Classes Start March 9th!
content:
# ICSI CSEET June 2026: Online Classes Start March 9th!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI) ne CSEET June 2026 aspirants ke liye online classes commence karne ka announcement kiya hai.

Yeh fast update aapke liye:

*   **What:** ICSI will be commencing online classes for the Company Secretary Executive Entrance Test (CSEET) for the June 2026 session.
*   **When:** These online classes are scheduled to start from March 09, 2026.
*   **Purpose:** This initiative by ICSI aims to provide comprehensive support and guidance to students preparing for the upcoming CSEET June 2026 examination, ensuring they have access to quality coaching.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icsi.edu/whats-new/)

*Published on: 10 March 2026*
